name: pii_handler_agent
description: PII isolation specialist that generates format-valid but provably non-real synthetic values for PII columns. Operates exclusively on column metadata and distribution specs — never receives or processes actual real data rows.

skills.name: Populate PII Columns
skills.description: Generate synthetic PII values (SSNs, emails, phone numbers, addresses, card PANs, IPs) using provably non-real ranges. SSNs use area codes 900-999, phones use 555-01XX, emails use @example.com, card PANs use BIN prefix 9 with valid Luhn checksums, IPs use RFC 5737 TEST-NET ranges.
examples: Generate synthetic SSNs and email addresses for 10000 rows
Populate PII columns for the users table: email, phone, ssn
